race.comment: MAQUISA (2) races best with her runs spaced and finds a winnable contest in this weaker race. Solid second here two-back over this track and trip, then stalked the good tempo with a respectable  third over 1200m at Warwick Farm in BM72 class. No excuses today. CALL ME SASSY (3) improving mare with her hoof on the till. Covered a stack of ground in the run and never gave up with a courageous second over 1250m at Newcastle. Can roll forward from the wide gate and sure to be thereabouts. RACH (4) win record hardly excites and quickly running out of chances. Shed her Maiden tag in good three-back at Kembla Grange and has struggled in two runs since in town. Maps well and comes here in peak condition. MANE CHARACTER (5) rounded them up with ease from the wide gate at the big odds first-up with a solid victory over 1200m at Gosford. Can go on with this prep and not to be underestimated.
